nasb.text: Judah and Israel were as numerous as the sand that is on the seashore in abundance; they were eating and drinking and rejoicing.

esv.text: Judah and Israel were as many as the sand by the sea. They ate and drank and were happy.

cnv.text: 猶大人和以色列人很多，像海邊的沙那樣多；他們都吃喝、快樂。

ccb.text: 犹大人和以色列人多如海沙，丰衣足食，生活幸福。
